series of phones is exclusive to [Verizon Wireless](/wiki/Verizon_Wireless "Verizon Wireless"). From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Type of mobile phone

For the newer lineup of Motorola smartphones since 2013, see [Motorola Moto](/wiki/Motorola_Moto "Motorola Moto").

The **Droid** series of phones is exclusive to [Verizon Wireless](/wiki/Verizon_Wireless "Verizon Wireless"). The branding "[Droid](/wiki/Droid_(Star_Wars) "Droid (Star Wars)")" is a registered trademark of [Lucasfilm](/wiki/Lucasfilm "Lucasfilm") and is licensed to Verizon for use. Many of these phones are also sold in other countries under different names (for example, [Motorola Droid](/wiki/Motorola_Droid "Motorola Droid") is called Milestone in Europe); see under the individual articles for details.

## History

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Verizon_Droid&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: History")]

It was announced on July 23, 2013, that Motorola will now exclusively manufacture Droid phones for Verizon.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

## Phones

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Verizon_Droid&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Phones")]

* [HTC Droid Eris](/wiki/HTC_Hero#Droid_Eris "HTC Hero") – Released on November 6, 2009
* [Motorola Droid](/wiki/Motorola_Droid "Motorola Droid") – Released November 6, 2009
* [HTC Droid Incredible](/wiki/Droid_Incredible "Droid Incredible") – Released on April 29, 2010
* [Motorola Droid X](/wiki/Droid_X "Droid X") – Released July 15, 2010
* [Motorola Droid 2](/wiki/Droid_2 "Droid 2") – Released August 12, 2010
* [Motorola Droid Pro](/wiki/Droid_Pro "Droid Pro") – Optimized for business users, released November 18, 2010
* [HTC Droid Incredible 2](/wiki/HTC_Incredible_S "HTC Incredible S") – Released April, 2011
* [Samsung Droid Charge](/wiki/Droid_Charge "Droid Charge") – Released May 14, 2011
* [Motorola Droid X2](/wiki/Droid_X2#Droid_X2 "Droid X2") – Released May 19, 2011
* [Motorola Droid 3](/wiki/Droid_3 "Droid 3") – Released July 7, 2011, shipping with [2.3.6 Gingerbread](/wiki/Android_Gingerbread "Android Gingerbread")
* [Motorola Droid Bionic](/wiki/Droid_Bionic "Droid Bionic") – Released September 8, 2011
* [Motorola Droid Razr](/wiki/Droid_Razr "Droid Razr") – Released November 11, 2011
* [Motorola Droid Razr Maxx](/wiki/Droid_Razr#Droid_Razr_Maxx "Droid Razr") – Shipping January 26, 2012
* [Motorola Droid 4](/wiki/Droid_4 "Droid 4") – Released February 10, 2012
* [HTC Droid Incredible 4G LTE](/wiki/Droid_Incredible_4G_LTE "Droid Incredible 4G LTE") – Released July 5, 2012
* [Motorola Droid Razr M](/wiki/Droid_Razr_M "Droid Razr M") – Released September 2012
* [Motorola Droid Razr HD](/wiki/Razr_HD "Razr HD") – Released October 18, 2012
* [Motorola Droid Razr HD Maxx](/wiki/Razr_HD#Droid_Razr_Maxx_HD "Razr HD") – Released October 18, 2012
* [HTC Droid DNA](/wiki/HTC_Butterfly "HTC Butterfly") – Released November 21, 2012
* [Motorola Droid Maxx](/wiki/Droid_Maxx "Droid Maxx") – Released July 23, 2013
* [Motorola Droid Ultra](/wiki/Droid_Maxx#Droid_Ultra_Variant "Droid Maxx") – Released July 23, 2013
* [Motorola Droid Mini](/wiki/Droid_Mini "Droid Mini") – Released July 23, 2013
* [Motorola Droid Turbo](/wiki/Droid_Turbo "Droid Turbo") – Released October 28, 2014
* [Motorola Droid Maxx 2](/wiki/Droid_Maxx_2 "Droid Maxx 2") – Released October 27, 2015
* [Motorola Droid Turbo 2](/wiki/Droid_Turbo_2 "Droid Turbo 2") – Released October 27, 2015
* [Moto Z](/wiki/Moto_Z "Moto Z") Droid – Released July 2016
* Moto Z Force Droid – Released July 2016
* Moto Z Play Droid – Released September 8, 2016
